name: @dataclaw/openclaw-dataclaw
description: OpenClaw plugin — exposes Dataclaw Python tools and routes Dataclaw UI messages to OpenClaw agents.

scripts.ensure-manifest: node -e "const f='src/tools/tool-manifest.generated.ts';require('fs').existsSync(f)||require('fs').writeFileSync(f,'import type { DataclawToolDefinition } from \"./types.js\";\nexport const DATACLAW_TOOL_MANIFEST: DataclawToolDefinition[] = [];\n')"

channel.label: Dataclaw
channel.blurb: Connect OpenClaw to the Dataclaw web frontend.
